2606.22325.title: All Routes Lead to Collapse
2606.22325.paper_summary: Attention sinks, representation collapse, and norm stratification are treated as transformer-specific pathologies. We show they are not specific to attention: they are what content-based routing does under a fixed similarity metric. We give a reframing identity: softmax attention is Boltzmann-weighted aggregation over Euclidean distances with constant key norms, so its score omits a $-\|k\|^2$ term and is blind to key magnitude. This predicts that any router whose metric is ill-matched to its representations should compensate, by concentrating its routing and collapsing the routed representations. We test it on routers that score and aggregate over different axes: softmax attention over tokens (nine pretrained transformers), graph attention over nodes, a selective state-space model and a recurrent mixer over time, and learned residuals over depth. All develop the same signature, and two within-model ablations show it is caused by the routing mechanism rather than by incidental dynamics. The form is contingent, set by the strength of the positional brake each router carries alongside its content score; we sweep that brake and move the onset across its whole range. The mechanism is not contingent, and it does not require norm stratification: a router with norm-normalized keys concentrates just the same. We do not claim these models implement Riemannian geometry; the geometric view is a diagnostic that names the inadequacy of the flat, norm-blind metric.
2606.22325.paper_summary_zh: 注意力下降、表示崩潰和規範分層被視為特定於Transformer的病理現象。<lb/>我們顯示這些現象並非僅限於注意力：它們是基於內容的路由在固定相似性度量下的表現。<lb/>我們給出了一個重新框架的身份：softmax注意力是對歐幾里得距離的玻爾茲曼加權聚合，具有恆定的鍵規範，因此其分數省略了 $-\|k\|^2$ 項，並對鍵的大小視而不見。<lb/>這預測了任何與其表示不匹配的度量的路由器應該通過集中其路由並崩潰路由表示來進行補償。<lb/>我們在不同軸上進行了測試，包括對標記的softmax注意力（九個預訓練Transformer）、對節點的圖注意力、選擇性狀態空間模型和隨時間的遞歸混合器，以及對深度的學習殘差。<lb/>所有模型都發展出相同的特徵，並且兩個模型內的消融實驗顯示這是由路由機制引起的，而不是偶然的動態。<lb/>這種形式是有條件的，由每個路由器在其內容分數旁邊攜帶的位置信號強度所設定；我們調整這個信號並將起始點移動到整個範圍。<lb/>這個機制不是有條件的，並且不需要規範分層：具有規範正規化鍵的路由器集中度量的方式是相同的。<lb/>我們並不聲稱這些模型實現了黎曼幾何；幾何視角是一種診斷，指出平坦、對規範盲目的度量的不足。
2606.22325.author: K. R. Balasubramanian et.al.
